zh.lifeSummary: Eleanor Aleanor Lancaster是Lancelot Plantagenet  Lancaster和Lady Anne Harrington的女兒，出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾蒙姆斯。她於1550年與Richard Cleborne在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1574年1月11日在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: Eleanor Aleanor Lancaster was born in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the daughter of Lancelot Plantagenet  Lancaster and Lady Anne Harrington. She married Richard Cleborne in 1550, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 11 January 1574, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Eleanor Aleanor Lancaster est née à Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fille de Lancelot Plantagenet  Lancaster et Lady Anne Harrington. Elle a épousé Richard Cleborne en 1550, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 11 janvier 1574, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Aleanor LancasterはイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウスでLancelot Plantagenet  LancasterとLady Anne Harringtonの娘として生まれた。1550年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでRichard Cleborneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1574年1月11日にイギリスイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Aleanor Lancaster(은)는 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스에서 Lancelot Plantagenet  Lancaster(와)과 Lady Anne Harrington의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Richard Cleborne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1574년 1월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Eleanor Aleanor Lancaster родилась в местности монмоут, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Lancelot Plantagenet  Lancaster и Lady Anne Harrington. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Cleborne в 1550 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 11 января 1574 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
